seoTitle: Bussmann News | Product Updates, Industry Trends, Events
seoDescription: Latest news and updates from Bussmann including new product releases, industry trends, and technical developments in circuit protection.

articles.title: Bussmann Expands EV Fuse Portfolio for 800V Battery Systems
articles.summary: Bussmann announces expanded EV fuse series supporting emerging 800V electric vehicle architectures with ratings up to 1000V DC and 100kA breaking capacity.
content: Bussmann has expanded its electric vehicle fuse portfolio to support the industry's transition to 800V battery systems. The new EV fuse series provides enhanced voltage ratings up to 1000V DC and breaking capacities up to 100kA.
The expanded portfolio addresses the growing demand for high-voltage protection in premium EVs and commercial electric vehicles. Key features include:
- Compact designs for battery pack integration
The new fuses are designed for battery pack protection, motor controllers, onboard chargers, and DC/DC converters in next-generation electric vehicles.

articles.title: Bussmann Releases 1500V Solar Fuse Series for Utility-Scale Installations
articles.summary: New gPV-certified 1500V DC fuse series designed for utility-scale solar installations, supporting the industry's move toward higher voltage systems.
content: Bussmann has introduced a new series of 1500V DC gPV-certified fuses specifically designed for utility-scale solar installations. The PV fuse series supports the industry's trend toward higher voltage systems that reduce DC cabling costs.
The new fuses are ideal for string protection, combiner boxes, and inverter input applications in large solar farms.

articles.title: Bussmann Enhances Industrial Fuse Series with Higher Breaking Capacity
articles.summary: Updated Class J and Class RK fuse series now offer breaking capacity up to 300kA for demanding industrial applications.
content: Bussmann has enhanced its industrial low voltage fuse series with improved breaking capacity ratings. The updated Class J and Class RK fuse series now provide breaking capacity up to 300kA AC.
The enhanced breaking capacity addresses the needs of large industrial facilities with high available fault currents. Key improvements include:
These improvements provide additional safety margin for industrial power distribution systems while maintaining the same physical dimensions for easy retrofit.

articles.title: Bussmann Introduces New Semiconductor Fuse Series for SiC Applications
articles.summary: New high-speed fuse series optimized for silicon carbide (SiC) power modules with ultra-low I2t values and fast clearing characteristics.
content: Bussmann has launched a new semiconductor fuse series specifically optimized for protecting silicon carbide (SiC) power modules. The new fuses feature ultra-low I2t values to match the fast switching characteristics of SiC devices.
Key features of the new series include:
The new fuses are ideal for EV inverters, solar inverters, and industrial motor drives using SiC technology.

articles.title: Bussmann EV Fuses Achieve AEC-Q200 Revision E Certification
articles.summary: Bussmann EV fuse series successfully completes AEC-Q200 Revision E qualification testing, meeting the latest automotive reliability standards.
content: Bussmann's EV fuse series has achieved AEC-Q200 Revision E certification, demonstrating compliance with the latest automotive reliability requirements. The certification covers the complete EV fuse portfolio including battery protection, charging, and power electronics fuses.
The AEC-Q200 Revision E qualification includes:
- Updated mechanical shock and vibration testing
This certification provides automotive manufacturers with confidence in Bussmann EV fuses for critical safety applications.
